tweets.text:
Bitcoin holders say they want loans against their BTC. Most don't. New research finds 88% would consider it but only 14% borrow. The blocker isn't rates. It's trust. Liquidation risk, volatility, unclear rules.

tweets.text:
📉 Bitcoin futures open interest fell 19.5%, dropping from $26.0B to $20.89B as traders reduced leveraged positions during the recent pullback.

The shift highlights a market increasingly driven by spot demand rather than speculative leverage.
